issue.title: `data_member_spec` should throw on anonymous union types

blockquote.p: "Each object of such an unnamed type shall be such an unnamed object."

discussion.p: restriction. I think we should therefore throw from `data_member_spec` if one attempts to use it with an anonymous union type.

p.ins: — `dealias(type)` does not represent an anonymous union type,
— `remove_all_extents(dealias(type))` does not represent an anonymous union type,

blockquote.pre: consteval info data_member_spec(info type, data_member_options options);

blockquote.p:
-4- Returns: […]
-5- Throws: `meta::exception` unless the following conditions are met:

li.p: (5.1) — `dealias(type)` represents either an object type or a reference type;

p.ins: (5.?) — `remove_all_extents(dealias(type))` does not represent an anonymous union type,
